title: Sex The Sewer
description: Lydia L'Scabies, putting the art in tart, the pro in prolapse, and the ‘fun gal' in fungal infection. Prepare to be taken on a darkly humorous trip down memory lane. From sexcapades, scandals, suspected arson, and sexually transmitted anything, let Lydia be your guide in this feature-length solo show of your worst nightmares. Sex and the Sewer premiered at Brighton Fringe in 2023 to thunderous applause and perilous screams - don't miss your chance to see this award-winning performer in the flesh. "Lydia L'Scabies... You really got under our skin – actually scratch that, you were cream–worthy!" - Dazed "If there ever was a name that perfectly personified the words ‘star quality' then it is Lydia L'Scabies" - Discover Brighton "Lydia L'Scabies is daring, gorgeous, diabolically wicked and unique. Do not miss Lydia in the fleshy flesh!" - Kate Nash "F*cking ace!" - Jodie Whittaker
